client_card.body: Felix, your interest in AI infrastructure and digital money stocks aligns with your values of innovation and speed, and considering your current portfolio allocation, it may be worth exploring how these themes can enhance your overall wealth strategy. I'd love to discuss how these emerging trends might fit into your investment approach and explore potential opportunities together.
